name: Buttermilk Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the first four ingredients.
2. Stir in the next six ingredients (wheat germ, sesame seeds, poppy seeds, brown sugar, chopped nuts if using, eggs, vegetable oil).
3. Beat together the last three ingredients and pour into the dry mixture.
4. Stir to combine everything thoroughly.
5. Fill muffin cups with the batter and bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
6. To make a loaf, fill a 9 x 5 inch loaf pan and bake for 1 hour at 350°F.
